heading: Eligibility of officers for consideration for promotion
label: 2113 Eligibility of officers for consideration for promotion

children.text: two years in the grade of lieutenant (junior grade);
three years in the grade of lieutenant;
four years in the grade of lieutenant commander;
four years in the grade of commander; and
three years in the grade of captain.

children.label: b
children.text: For the purpose of this section, service in a grade includes all qualifying service in that grade or a higher grade, under either a temporary or permanent appointment. However, service in a grade under a temporary service appointment under is considered as service only in the grade that the officer concerned would have held had he not been so appointed.section 2125 of this title

children.label: c
children.text: No officer may become eligible for consideration for promotion until all officers of his grade senior to him are so eligible.
is not promoted to that grade.

children.label: e
children.text: An officer whose involuntary retirement or separation is deferred under is not eligible for consideration for promotion to the next higher grade during the period of that deferment.section 2156 of this title

children.label: f
children.text: The Secretary may waive subsection (a) to the extent necessary to allow officers described therein to have at least two opportunities for consideration for promotion to the next higher grade as officers below the promotion zone.

Notwithstanding subsection (a), the Commandant may provide that an officer may, upon the officer’s request and with the approval of the Commandant, be excluded from consideration by a selection board convened under section 2106.

children.label: A
children.text: the basis for the request is to allow the officer to complete a broadening assignment, advanced education, another assignment of significant value to the Coast Guard, a career progression requirement delayed by the assignment or education, or a qualifying personal or professional circumstance, as determined by the Commandant;

children.label: B
children.text: the Commandant determines the exclusion from consideration is in the best interest of the Coast Guard; and

children.label: C
children.text: the officer has not previously failed of selection for promotion to the grade for which the officer requests the exclusion from consideration.
